name: eas-context
description: Stdio MCP server that exposes .eas/ (instruction, decisions, project, charters, audit) as tools and resources so any Copilot CLI or VS Code agent can read shared org context without re-loading files.

_copilotCliExample.comment: Drop the block below into ~/.copilot/mcp-config.json (or your project's .mcp.json) to wire up @eas-context as an MCP server.

_vscodeExample.comment: VS Code MCP block (settings.json under chat.mcp.servers).
